text:
On 2/6/10, b. f. <bf1783@googlemail.com> wrote:
> I wrongly attributed the port: in the pkg-descr, please
> s/Beliakin/Beliakov/ before committing.
>

>

The Australian University that hosts this project has some kind of
stupid redirect to a legal disclaimer page.  If this breaks the fetch
for you, let me know -- we may need to tinker with the FETCH*ARGS or
upload the distfile to a FreeBSD server.

b.
